The segment concludes with a wide shot of the stage, emphasizing the grandeur of the moment and the celebratory atmosphere.

The scene shifts to the audience, where a man with long dark hair in a black velvet tuxedo (Brad Pitt) is seen clapping warmly, followed by a wide shot of the stage where a group of formally dressed individuals, including a woman in a black sequined gown with red hair (the Woman in Black Sequined Gown), stands at a microphone. She is flanked by several men in black tuxedos, including one with glasses and another with a bow tie, and a woman in a black outfit holding an Oscar statuette. The group appears emotional and proud as they accept an award, with the Woman in Black Sequined Gown speaking into the microphone while others smile and look on. The camera cuts to the audience, showing a woman with short gray hair and large hoop earrings (Woman with Short Gray Hair and Hoop Earrings) and a young man in a tuxedo (Young Man in Tuxedo) listening intently. The scene returns to the stage, where the group continues to celebrate, with the Woman in Black Sequined Gown gesturing expressively. The audience is shown again, with a woman in a shimmering silver gown (Woman in Shimmering Silver Gown) laughing joyfully, and a woman with a shaved head and white gown (Cynthia Erivo) clapping with a serious expression. The stage group remains the focus, with the Woman in Black Sequined Gown continuing her speech, and the ABC logo visible in the bottom right corner throughout. The atmosphere is one of triumph and emotion, underscored by the golden, sparkling backdrop and the formal attire of all participants.
